feed.title: DzBoom
feed.subtitle: Ent fun channel for super muper dudes

entry.title: Uhuru launches internet balloons, urges Kenyans to utilise 4G network

link.title: Uhuru launches internet balloons, urges Kenyans to utilise 4G network

entry.content: President Uhuru Kenyatta has virtually launched the Loon internet balloons that will see mobile phone users in 14 counties access 4G network. This is after Telkom Kenya entered partnership with Google parent firm Alphabet
entry.summary: President Uhuru Kenyatta has virtually launched the Loon internet balloons that will see mobile phone users in 14 counties access 4G network. This is after Telkom Kenya entered partnership with Google parent firm Alphabet

entry.title: Sonu Sood shares workout video with son Eshaan

link.title: Sonu Sood shares workout video with son Eshaan

entry.content: Actor Sonu Sood is a fitness icon for the youth, and it turns out his son Eshaan is no less a health freak.
entry.summary: Actor Sonu Sood is a fitness icon for the youth, and it turns out his son Eshaan is no less a health freak.

entry.title: कानपुर एकनाउंटर का आरोपी Vikas Dubey Ujjain से गिरफ्तार l Vikas Dubey Arrested

link.title: कानपुर एकनाउंटर का आरोपी Vikas Dubey Ujjain से गिरफ्तार l Vikas Dubey Arrested

entry.content:
विकास दुबे हुआ गिरफ्तार, उज्जैन में महाकाल के दर्शन के बाद निकला था. विकास दुबे हुआ गिरफ्तार, उज्जैन में महाकाल के दर्शन के बाद निकला था बाहर l
कानपुर एकनाउंटर का मुख्य आरोपी विकास दुबे उज्जैन से गिरफ्तार हो गया. वह मध्य प्रदेश के उज्जैन में महाकाल का दर्शन कर बाहर निकला ही था कि उसे गिरफ्तार कर लिया गया l
नई दिल्ली: कानपुर एकनाउंटर का मुख्य आरोपी विकास दुबे उज्जैन से गिरफ्तार हो गया. वह मध्य प्रदेश के उज्जैन में महाकाल का दर्शन कर बाहर निकला ही था कि उसे गिरफ्तार कर लिया गया.
इससे पहले विकास दुबे के दो साथी आज एनकाउंटर में ढेर हो गए. प्रभात मिश्रा पुलिस हिरासत से भागने की कोशिश कर रहा था, जिसके बाद एनकाउंटर में उसे ढेर कर दिया गया. प्रभात मिश्रा को बुधवार को फरीदाबाद से गिरफ्तार किया गया था. इसके अलावा विकास दुबे गैंग का एक और मोस्ट वांटेड क्रिमिनल बबन शुक्ला भी इटावा में ढेर हो गया.
entry.summary: विकास दुबे हुआ गिरफ्तार, उज्जैन में महाकाल के दर्शन के बाद निकला था. विकास दुबे हुआ गिरफ्तार, उज्जैन में महाकाल के दर्शन के बाद निकला था बाहर l कानपुर एकनाउंटर का मुख्य आरोपी विकास दुबे उज्जैन से गिरफ्तार हो गया. वह मध्य प्रदेश के उज्जैन में महाकाल का दर्शन कर बाहर निकला ही था कि उसे गिरफ्तार कर लिया गया l नई दिल्ली: कानपुर एकनाउंटर का मुख्य आरोपी विकास दुबे उज्जैन से गिरफ्तार हो गया. वह मध्य प्रदेश के उज्जैन में महाकाल का दर्शन कर बाहर निकला ही था कि उसे गिरफ्तार कर लिया गया. इससे पहले विकास दुबे के दो साथी आज एनकाउंटर में ढेर हो गए. प्रभात मिश्रा पुलिस हिरासत से भागने की कोशिश कर रहा था, जिसके बाद एनकाउंटर में उसे ढेर कर दिया गया. प्रभात मिश्रा को बुधवार को फरीदाबाद से गिरफ्तार किया गया था. इसके अलावा विकास दुबे गैंग का एक और मोस्ट वांटेड क्रिमिनल बबन शुक्ला भी इटावा में ढेर हो गया.

entry.title: Coronavirus in India : Corona Vaccine COVAXIN का ह्यूमन ट्रायल शुरू, जानिए डिटेल वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Coronavirus in India : Corona Vaccine COVAXIN का ह्यूमन ट्रायल शुरू, जानिए डिटेल वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Corona cases are not taking the name of pause. India has reached number three in the world in the case of Corona case. However, the Health Ministry said on Tuesday that the corona virus cases and mortality rate in India is one of the lowest in the world at one million population. There is news of another relief. That’s about the vaccine. India’s first corona vaccine COVAXIN’s human trial has begun.
कोरोना के मामले थमने का नाम नहीं ले रहे हैं. भारत कोरोना केस के मामले में दुनिया में तीसरे नंबर पर पहुंच चुका है. हालांकि स्वास्थ्य मंत्रालय ने मंगलवार को कहा कि भारत में दस लाख की आबादी पर कोरोना वायरस के मामले और मृत्यु दर दुनिया में सबसे कम है. वहीं एक और राहत की खबर आई है. वो है वैक्सिन को लेकर. भारत का पहला कोरोना वैक्सीन COVAXIN के ह्यूमन ट्रायल की शुरुआत हो चुकी है.
#Coronavirus #COVAXIN #oneindiahindi
entry.summary: Corona cases are not taking the name of pause. India has reached number three in the world in the case of Corona case. However, the Health Ministry said on Tuesday that the corona virus cases and mortality rate in India is one of the lowest in the world at one million population. There is news of another relief. That’s about the vaccine. India’s first corona vaccine COVAXIN’s human trial has begun. कोरोना के मामले थमने का नाम नहीं ले रहे हैं. भारत कोरोना केस के मामले में दुनिया में तीसरे नंबर पर पहुंच चुका है. हालांकि स्वास्थ्य मंत्रालय ने मंगलवार को कहा कि भारत में दस लाख की आबादी पर कोरोना वायरस के मामले और मृत्यु दर दुनिया में सबसे कम है. वहीं एक और राहत की खबर आई है. वो है वैक्सिन को लेकर. भारत का पहला कोरोना वैक्सीन COVAXIN के ह्यूमन ट्रायल की शुरुआत हो चुकी है. #Coronavirus #COVAXIN #oneindiahindi

entry.title: Ini Dia Sanksi Belanja Pakai Kresek

link.title: Ini Dia Sanksi Belanja Pakai Kresek

entry.content:
JAKARTA, KOMPAS.TV - Memasuki hari ketiga larangan penggunaan plastik sekali pakai, masyarakat mulai beradaptasi.
Bagaimana cara mereka mengganti penggunaan tas plastik sekali pakai.
Berikut ini laporan Jurnalis Kompas TV, Elgeen Frydianto, dan juru kamera Denny Yosua, di salah satu pasar swalayan di kawasan Jakarta Pusat.
Sementara itu, industri plastik Indonesia merasa larangan penggunaan tas kresek kurang tepat, mengatasi persoalan sampah. Selama ini, manajemen sampah yang harus diperbaiki.
Sebelumnya, Larangan penggunaan kantong plastik sekali pakai di Jakarta mulai berlaku hari ini, Rabu (01,07,2020).
Supermarket dan pusat perbelanjaan lainnya hanya menyediakan kantong belanja ramah lingkungan dan pembeli didorong untuk membawa kantong belanja sendiri dari rumah.
Selain itu, Indonesia menjadi salah satu penyumbang sampah plastik terbesar di dunia. Terdorong oleh kondisi memprihatinkan ini, tiga mahasiswa Universitas Kristen Satya Wacana atau UKSW di Salatiga, Jawa Tengah, berinovasi membuat bioplastik dari kulit singkong.
Bioplastik ini pun mampu terurai di dalam tanah hanya dalam kurun waktu dua bulan.
Ide dasar dari bioplastik berbahan dasar kulit singkong ini muncul dari keprihatinan atas tingginya produksi sampah di bumi.
Menurut Kesha, kulit singkong dipilih karena mengandung sekitar 60 persen polisakarida berupa pati. Jadi, tak hanya berujung limbah.
entry.summary: JAKARTA, KOMPAS.TV - Memasuki hari ketiga larangan penggunaan plastik sekali pakai, masyarakat mulai beradaptasi. Bagaimana cara mereka mengganti penggunaan tas plastik sekali pakai. Berikut ini laporan Jurnalis Kompas TV, Elgeen Frydianto, dan juru kamera Denny Yosua, di salah satu pasar swalayan di kawasan Jakarta Pusat. Sementara itu, industri plastik Indonesia merasa larangan penggunaan tas kresek kurang tepat, mengatasi persoalan sampah. Selama ini, manajemen sampah yang harus diperbaiki. Sebelumnya, Larangan penggunaan kantong plastik sekali pakai di Jakarta mulai berlaku hari ini, Rabu (01,07,2020). Supermarket dan pusat perbelanjaan lainnya hanya menyediakan kantong belanja ramah lingkungan dan pembeli didorong untuk membawa kantong belanja sendiri dari rumah. Selain itu, Indonesia menjadi salah satu penyumbang sampah plastik terbesar di dunia. Terdorong oleh kondisi memprihatinkan ini, tiga mahasiswa Universitas Kristen Satya Wacana atau UKSW di Salatiga, Jawa Tengah, berinovasi membuat bioplastik dari kulit singkong. Bioplastik ini pun mampu terurai di dalam tanah hanya dalam kurun waktu dua bulan. Ide dasar dari bioplastik berbahan dasar kulit singkong ini muncul dari keprihatinan atas tingginya produksi sampah di bumi. Menurut Kesha, kulit singkong dipilih karena mengandung sekitar 60 persen polisakarida berupa pati. Jadi, tak hanya berujung limbah.

entry.title: Ethiopia: Military deployed after more than 80 killed in protests

link.title: Ethiopia: Military deployed after more than 80 killed in protests

entry.content:
Oromia demonstrations broke out after assassination of well-known singer Haacaaluu Hundeessaa.
Ethiopia: Military deployed after more than 80 killed in protests
Ethiopia: Military deployed after more than 80 killed in protests
Ethiopia: Military deployed after more than 80 killed in protests
entry.summary: Oromia demonstrations broke out after assassination of well-known singer Haacaaluu Hundeessaa.Ethiopia: Military deployed after more than 80 killed in protests Ethiopia: Military deployed after more than 80 killed in protests Ethiopia: Military deployed after more than 80 killed in protests

entry.title: How entrepreneurs can change the world we live in - Pioneering People podcast

link.title: How entrepreneurs can change the world we live in - Pioneering People podcast

entry.content: Sarah Ronald is a Scottish entrepreneur and angel investor, who is the founder of Nile, a service design company. Sarah had an early interest in psychology and how the mind worked. This led her to study an MSC in Human Computer Interaction, the study of how humans interact with machines. Then in 2006, with 3 others, she founded Bunnyfoot Scotland- a user experience company specialising in technology such as i-tracking. However, different business goals among the founders resulted in Sarah undertaking management buyout. As part of the agreement, Sarah re-branded under the name of ‘Nile’ to focus on service design. An area of design specialising in imagining products and services whilst figuring out what technology and human resources are necessary in delivering them. Nile’s clients include RBS with work including designing the Scottish bank note. Sarah has been active in championing service design including being the Co-chair and founding member of the Service Design Network UK. She also has a passion for investment. Not only does Nile have a venture arm that invests in local entrepreneurs but also Sarah is a syndicate investor for Par Equity. Among other things, Sarah shares her business insights on why investment can activate positive change and why an optimistic outlook is key to running a successful business.
entry.summary: Sarah Ronald is a Scottish entrepreneur and angel investor, who is the founder of Nile, a service design company. Sarah had an early interest in psychology and how the mind worked. This led her to study an MSC in Human Computer Interaction, the study of how humans interact with machines. Then in 2006, with 3 others, she founded Bunnyfoot Scotland- a user experience company specialising in technology such as i-tracking. However, different business goals among the founders resulted in Sarah undertaking management buyout. As part of the agreement, Sarah re-branded under the name of ‘Nile’ to focus on service design. An area of design specialising in imagining products and services whilst figuring out what technology and human resources are necessary in delivering them. Nile’s clients include RBS with work including designing the Scottish bank note. Sarah has been active in championing service design including being the Co-chair and founding member of the Service Design Network UK. She also has a passion for investment. Not only does Nile have a venture arm that invests in local entrepreneurs but also Sarah is a syndicate investor for Par Equity. Among other things, Sarah shares her business insights on why investment can activate positive change and why an optimistic outlook is key to running a successful business.

link.title: Anup Jalota Remembers Sushant Singh Rajput’s Best Work In MS Dhoni Biopic

entry.content:
Anup says that Sushant Singh Rajput’s death is a huge loss to the industry and to the nation as a whole. "It’s extremely sad that such an established actor had to go this way."

entry.title: Fireworks light up sky above Washington DC on Independence Day

link.title: Fireworks light up sky above Washington DC on Independence Day

entry.content:
A stunning fireworks display lit up Washington, D.C. on Saturday (July 4th) night as Americans celebrated Independence Day.
Independence Day is a federal holiday in the United States commemorating the Declaration of Independence of the United States, on July 4, 1776
entry.summary: A stunning fireworks display lit up Washington, D.C. on Saturday (July 4th) night as Americans celebrated Independence Day. Independence Day is a federal holiday in the United States commemorating the Declaration of Independence of the United States, on July 4, 1776

entry.title: Coronavirus: Brazil’s President Jair Bolsonaro tests positive for Covid-19 Oneindia News

link.title: Coronavirus: Brazil’s President Jair Bolsonaro tests positive for Covid-19 Oneindia News

entry.content: Brazil’s President Jair Bolsonaro has tested positive for coronavirus. He took his fouth test on Monday after developing symptoms including a high temperature. This as Bolsonaro has repeatedly played down risks of what he has called the "little flu", saying he would not be seriously affected. He has opposed lockdowns, which he says hurt the economy. Brazil has the second-highest number of Covid-19 cases and deaths in the world, after the US. He made the announcement in a TV interview on Tuesday, saying the fever he had been experiencing had gone down and that he felt "very well". Bolsonaro said that he had started experiencing symptoms on Sunday.
entry.summary: Brazil’s President Jair Bolsonaro has tested positive for coronavirus. He took his fouth test on Monday after developing symptoms including a high temperature. This as Bolsonaro has repeatedly played down risks of what he has called the "little flu", saying he would not be seriously affected. He has opposed lockdowns, which he says hurt the economy. Brazil has the second-highest number of Covid-19 cases and deaths in the world, after the US. He made the announcement in a TV interview on Tuesday, saying the fever he had been experiencing had gone down and that he felt "very well". Bolsonaro said that he had started experiencing symptoms on Sunday.

entry.title: Government’s direction less ‘Unlock2’ begins

link.title: Government’s direction less ‘Unlock2’ begins

entry.content:
The Covid-19 graph is sharply increasing in India but government is still not proactive, after the failed experiments of lockdown and unlock1, government has now implemented Unlock2 and again without direction and strategy, no enhancements in ventilators, testing and preventive measures has been announced by the government
#Covid19 #Unlock2 #CoronaVirus
entry.summary: The Covid-19 graph is sharply increasing in India but government is still not proactive, after the failed experiments of lockdown and unlock1, government has now implemented Unlock2 and again without direction and strategy, no enhancements in ventilators, testing and preventive measures has been announced by the government #Covid19 #Unlock2 #CoronaVirus

link.title: Brunch-favourite ‘Made By Jonty’ is getting ready to return - complete with QR-code menus, and socially-distanced tables

entry.content: It’s being titled ‘the new normal’ - and that’s exactly what Jonty Cork is seeking to get perfect before his eatery returns to the city on Wednesday.
entry.summary: It’s being titled ‘the new normal’ - and that’s exactly what Jonty Cork is seeking to get perfect before his eatery returns to the city on Wednesday.

entry.title: UNLOCK-2.0: जल्द ही पटरी पर दौड़ेंगी 90 नई Special Trains, जानिए पूरी डिटेल वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: UNLOCK-2.0: जल्द ही पटरी पर दौड़ेंगी 90 नई Special Trains, जानिए पूरी डिटेल वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
UNLOCK-2.0: 90 new special trains to run soon, see full list. The unlocking process is now underway between the lockdowns released in the country. From July 1, 2.0 has started. Meanwhile, the central government may start 45 new trains i.e. 90 pairs. According to sources, the Railways has sent a list of trains to the Home Ministries for approval for this.
देश में जारी लॉकडाउन के बीच अब अनलॉक की प्रक्रिया जारी है.1 जुलाई से 2.0 की शुरूआत हो चुकी है. इस बीच केंद्र सरकार ने 45 जोड़ी यानी 90 नई स्पेशल ट्रेनें शुरू कर सकती है. सूत्रों के मुताबिक रेलवे ने इसकी लिए मंजूरी के लिए गृह मंत्रालयों को ट्रेनों की सूची भेजी है.
#UNLOCK2 #SpecialTrains #IndianRailway
entry.summary: UNLOCK-2.0: 90 new special trains to run soon, see full list. The unlocking process is now underway between the lockdowns released in the country. From July 1, 2.0 has started. Meanwhile, the central government may start 45 new trains i.e. 90 pairs. According to sources, the Railways has sent a list of trains to the Home Ministries for approval for this. देश में जारी लॉकडाउन के बीच अब अनलॉक की प्रक्रिया जारी है.1 जुलाई से 2.0 की शुरूआत हो चुकी है. इस बीच केंद्र सरकार ने 45 जोड़ी यानी 90 नई स्पेशल ट्रेनें शुरू कर सकती है. सूत्रों के मुताबिक रेलवे ने इसकी लिए मंजूरी के लिए गृह मंत्रालयों को ट्रेनों की सूची भेजी है. #UNLOCK2 #SpecialTrains #IndianRailway

entry.title: Trabzonspor’dan taraftarından Hüseyin Çimşir’e: ‘Allah için bu takımı şampiyon yapın hocam’

link.title: Trabzonspor’dan taraftarından Hüseyin Çimşir’e: ‘Allah için bu takımı şampiyon yapın hocam’

entry.content: Galatasaray, Süper Lig’in 30. haftasında oynanacak dev maçta ezeli rakibi Trabzonspor’u ağırlayacak. Bordo-mavili taraftarlar karşılaşma öncesi takıma moral verdi.
entry.summary: Galatasaray, Süper Lig’in 30. haftasında oynanacak dev maçta ezeli rakibi Trabzonspor’u ağırlayacak. Bordo-mavili taraftarlar karşılaşma öncesi takıma moral verdi.

Biden et Trump s’affrontent aussi sur le terrain de leur santé pour les élections
Biden et Trump s'affrontent aussi sur le terrain de leur santé pour les élections
entry.summary: Une seule chose est sûre: le futur président américain aura plus de 70 ans.Biden et Trump s’affrontent aussi sur le terrain de leur santé pour les élections Biden et Trump s’affrontent aussi sur le terrain de leur santé pour les élections Biden et Trump s'affrontent aussi sur le terrain de leur santé pour les élections

entry.title: Malaysian Immigration Police Raid Apartments during COVID-19, arrest 200

link.title: Malaysian Immigration Police Raid Apartments during COVID-19, arrest 200

entry.content: Malaysian immigration authorities raided apartment buildings in Petaling Jaya Old Town on Wednesday morning, arresting about 200 people who had emigrated to the southeast Asian country. All 200 arrestees were tested for COVID-19, according to Immigration Department director-general Datuk Khairul Dzaimee Daud. Police have said recent raids were motivated by a desire to curb the spread of the virus, which originated in China. Police wore head-to-toe protection as they raided the apartments, but each of the detained immigrants was confirmed negative for the disease. The migrants were given masks and led in chains onto buses. They are expected to be deported back to their home countries. The arrests targeted people from Indonesia, Bangladesh, Pakistan, India and Myanmar. Some Malaysians particularly oppose the presence of Rohingya refugees in their country, fearing they might bring COVID-19 when they emigrate. Rohingya people come from Myanmar, are mostly Muslim and speak Bengali. Wednesday’s arrests came three days before the end of the Muslim Ramadan holiday. A recent letter signed by 84 human rights groups urged a response to immigrAtion authorities targeting immigrants. The Malaysian government continues to turn away refugees, ramping up its deportation program. Malaysia has seen about 7,000 COVID-19 cases, but only 114 deaths, according to the Center for Strategic and International Studies. Malaysians are living under an “Enhanced Movement Control Order,” which will be in place until June 10. Petaling Jaya Old Town’s quarantine, ordered when 26 COVID-19 cases were confirmed there, will be lifted Thursday morning. People on the streets are subject to arrest unless they have government-approved reasons to leave their homes. Filmed by Samsul Said
entry.summary: Malaysian immigration authorities raided apartment buildings in Petaling Jaya Old Town on Wednesday morning, arresting about 200 people who had emigrated to the southeast Asian country. All 200 arrestees were tested for COVID-19, according to Immigration Department director-general Datuk Khairul Dzaimee Daud. Police have said recent raids were motivated by a desire to curb the spread of the virus, which originated in China. Police wore head-to-toe protection as they raided the apartments, but each of the detained immigrants was confirmed negative for the disease. The migrants were given masks and led in chains onto buses. They are expected to be deported back to their home countries. The arrests targeted people from Indonesia, Bangladesh, Pakistan, India and Myanmar. Some Malaysians particularly oppose the presence of Rohingya refugees in their country, fearing they might bring COVID-19 when they emigrate. Rohingya people come from Myanmar, are mostly Muslim and speak Bengali. Wednesday’s arrests came three days before the end of the Muslim Ramadan holiday. A recent letter signed by 84 human rights groups urged a response to immigrAtion authorities targeting immigrants. The Malaysian government continues to turn away refugees, ramping up its deportation program. Malaysia has seen about 7,000 COVID-19 cases, but only 114 deaths, according to the Center for Strategic and International Studies. Malaysians are living under an “Enhanced Movement Control Order,” which will be in place until June 10. Petaling Jaya Old Town’s quarantine, ordered when 26 COVID-19 cases were confirmed there, will be lifted Thursday morning. People on the streets are subject to arrest unless they have government-approved reasons to leave their homes. Filmed by Samsul Said

entry.title: India Should let Japan , Australia and US into Andaman and Nicobar Oneindia Kannada

link.title: India Should let Japan , Australia and US into Andaman and Nicobar Oneindia Kannada

entry.content:
ಜಪಾನಿನ ಭಾರತದ ಎಂಬೆಸಿ ಯಲ್ಲಿ ಈ ಹಿಂದೆ ಕಾರ್ಯ ನಿರ್ವಹಿಸಿರುವ ಸುಜನ್ ಚಿನೋಯ್ ಅವರು ಚೀನಾಕ್ಕೆ ಪಾಠ ಕಲಿಸೋ ಕುರಿತು ಒಂದು ಸಲಹೆಯನ್ನು ನೀಡಿದ್ದಾರೆ
Indian diplomat who was formerly working at Indian Embassyin Japan has written in his recent paper that India should allow contries like US , Australia , japan and France to set their military base in Andaman and Nicobar Islands which will help in the co operation against China.
entry.summary: ಜಪಾನಿನ ಭಾರತದ ಎಂಬೆಸಿ ಯಲ್ಲಿ ಈ ಹಿಂದೆ ಕಾರ್ಯ ನಿರ್ವಹಿಸಿರುವ ಸುಜನ್ ಚಿನೋಯ್ ಅವರು ಚೀನಾಕ್ಕೆ ಪಾಠ ಕಲಿಸೋ ಕುರಿತು ಒಂದು ಸಲಹೆಯನ್ನು ನೀಡಿದ್ದಾರೆ Indian diplomat who was formerly working at Indian Embassyin Japan has written in his recent paper that India should allow contries like US , Australia , japan and France to set their military base in Andaman and Nicobar Islands which will help in the co operation against China.

entry.title: Backtrack: Can you get a Covid-19 test?

link.title: Backtrack: Can you get a Covid-19 test?

entry.content:
Ever since Unlock 1.0 which began in June, cases of Covid-19 have been rising rapidly across India.
The ICMR’s decision to ‘test, track and treat’ is laudable, but it hasn’t done anything to expand the scope of testing criteria.
While most Tier 1 cities in India are running out of hospital beds, asymptomatic individuals don’t meet the criteria for a Covid-19 test, making it harder to track transmission.
On this episode of Backtrack, we look at ICMR’s guidelines for Covid-19 testing and attempt to answer why the lack of tests for asymptomatic individuals may be counter-intuitive.
entry.summary: Ever since Unlock 1.0 which began in June, cases of Covid-19 have been rising rapidly across India. The ICMR’s decision to ‘test, track and treat’ is laudable, but it hasn’t done anything to expand the scope of testing criteria. While most Tier 1 cities in India are running out of hospital beds, asymptomatic individuals don’t meet the criteria for a Covid-19 test, making it harder to track transmission. On this episode of Backtrack, we look at ICMR’s guidelines for Covid-19 testing and attempt to answer why the lack of tests for asymptomatic individuals may be counter-intuitive.
